alerts.trigger: Active conflict escalated to severity high; regime collapse
alerts.headline: Iran under massive US-Israeli military strikes; Supreme Leader Khamenei killed
alerts.details: US and Israel launched joint Operation Epic Fury on Feb 28, striking 1,000+ targets in Iran. Supreme Leader Khamenei was killed. Iran retaliated with strikes on 27 US bases and Gulf Arab states. IRGC consolidating control during 40-day mourning period. Succession crisis with no clear heir. Active military conflict continues with no ceasefire in sight. Conditions persist and may be worsening as IRGC pledges sustained retaliation campaign.

alerts.trigger: IRGC struck Al Dhafra base; missiles hit Dubai and Abu Dhabi; Hormuz closure
alerts.headline: UAE under direct Iranian missile attacks; Hormuz closure blocks oil/LNG exports
alerts.details: IRGC struck Al Dhafra Air Base and launched missiles at Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Aviation severely disrupted with 7,700+ delays and 2,280 cancellations. UAE closed Tehran embassy. Hormuz closure blocks oil and LNG exports (76% chokepoint exposure). Current account trend strong_decrease, trade openness strong_decrease, FDI strong_decrease, investment risk strong_growth. Tourism and financial services severely impacted. Escalated from chokepoint exposure to direct military targeting.

alerts.trigger: Active multi-front conflict; Hezbollah ceasefire collapse; IRGC retaliation; military spending 8.8% GDP
alerts.headline: Israel faces multi-front war as Hezbollah breaks ceasefire and IRGC retaliates
alerts.details: Israel's security situation critically deteriorated. Hezbollah broke the November 2024 ceasefire on March 1, firing rockets at northern Israel. IRGC launched retaliatory strikes including a missile that hit a road in West Jerusalem. Military spending at 8.8% of GDP (2nd highest globally). Debt trend strong_growth. Political stability at -1.46 with budget deadline March 31 that could trigger government dissolution. Upgraded from warning to critical due to multi-front conflict escalation.

Trade openness trend growth as effective tariff rate dropped from 16% to 9.1%. Companies suing for $134B+ in refunds. Fundamental restructuring of US trade policy legal framework ongoing.

alerts.trigger: Military: Southern counteroffensive; Flamingo missiles strike Russia
alerts.headline: Ukraine counteroffensive gains and improved offensive capabilities
alerts.details: Southern counteroffensive recaptured 300+ sq km. Flamingo missiles struck Russian ICBM factory. IMF $8.1B loan approved. Ukraine striking Russian Caspian oil infrastructure via drone. Conditions persist.

alerts.trigger: Cross-strait tensions; PLA blockade simulation; airspace violation
alerts.headline: Taiwan faces Chinese military escalation with blockade simulation
alerts.details: China blockade simulation exercises (Justice Mission 2025). PLA drone flew through Taiwanese airspace. China-Japan sanctions escalation signals broader regional security deterioration. Chokepoint exposure at 0.69. Conditions persist.

alerts.trigger: Snap election called March 24 amid Trump-Greenland standoff
alerts.headline: Denmark snap election March 24 over Greenland sovereignty
alerts.details: Snap election for March 24. Social Democrats polling above 30%. Trump threatened tariffs over Greenland. Conditions persist with election approaching.

alerts.trigger: Nuclear proliferation: hypersonic missile test; 9th Party Congress
alerts.headline: North Korea tests hypersonic missiles; nuclear proliferation risk
alerts.details: North Korea tested hypersonic missiles Jan 4. 9th Party Congress convened. Combined with New START expiration. Regional stability implications for KOR, JPN, CHN. Conditions persist.

alerts.trigger: Political crisis >1 year; EU accession suspended; protests ongoing
alerts.headline: Georgia political crisis with EU accession suspended
alerts.details: Protests past 300-day mark. EU accession suspended until end of 2028. European Parliament did not recognize October 2024 election. Conditions persist.
alerts.title: Georgia political crisis with EU accession suspended

alerts.trigger: Hezbollah ceasefire collapse; northern front reopened Mar 1
alerts.headline: Hezbollah breaks November 2024 ceasefire; fires rockets at northern Israel
alerts.details: Hezbollah broke the November 2024 ceasefire on March 1, firing rockets at northern Israel. This reopens the northern front alongside the ongoing Gaza campaign and new Iran-Israel conflict axis. Israel now faces a three-front war: Gaza, Lebanon, and Iran. The ceasefire collapse represents a major escalation of regional conflict.
alerts.title: Hezbollah breaks November 2024 ceasefire; fires rockets at northern Israel

alerts.trigger: Major policy shift: Senate approves landmark labor reform (42-28); positive structural change
alerts.headline: Argentina Senate approves landmark labor reform advancing Milei restructuring agenda
alerts.details: Argentina's Senate approved a landmark labor reform law on Feb 27 by a vote of 42-28, advancing Milei's economic restructuring agenda. Monthly inflation decelerated to 2.9% (from peak of 25%+). GDP at 4.5% with stable trend. Political stability improving. This is a positive structural development for Argentina's investment climate, though sovereign credit remains CCC+/Caa1.
alerts.title: Argentina Senate approves landmark labor reform advancing Milei restructuring agenda

alerts.trigger: Major trade agreement: US-Indonesia sign $33 billion trade deal Feb 19
alerts.headline: US-Indonesia sign $33 billion trade agreement positioning Indonesia in US orbit
alerts.details: US and Indonesia signed a $33 billion trade agreement on Feb 19, significantly strengthening bilateral economic ties. This positions Indonesia as a key US partner in Southeast Asia amid China competition. FDI trend growth. GDP stable at 4.9%. However, SCOTUS IEEPA ruling questions enforceability of executive trade deals.

alerts.trigger: Leadership change: PM Anutin forms new coalition government Feb 13
alerts.headline: Thailand PM Anutin forms coalition government following political transition
alerts.details: Thailand's PM Anutin formed a new coalition government on February 13, 2026. This represents a political transition that could affect policy direction. Thailand's political stability and investment climate are in a period of adjustment under new leadership.

alerts.trigger: Trend direction reversal: US relations with key partners deteriorating from Iran strikes
alerts.headline: US diplomatic relations strained by Iran strikes; allies condemn actions at UNSC
alerts.details: US relations with key partners strained by unilateral Iran strikes. Spain PM condemned strikes as breach of international law. France, Russia, China called UNSC emergency session. Additional 10% tariff on China and 25% on Canada effective March 4. US-Indonesia deal provides counterpoint. Relations trend decrease overall.
alerts.title: US diplomatic relations strained by Iran strikes and tariff escalation
alerts.description: US relations with key partners strained by unilateral Iran strikes. Spain PM condemned strikes as breach of international law. France, Russia, China called UNSC emergency session. Additional 10% tariff on China and 25% on Canada effective March 4. US-Indonesia deal provides counterpoint. Relations trend decrease overall.

alerts.trigger: Trade-dependent economy (CA 17.5% GDP) facing Hormuz shipping disruption
alerts.headline: Singapore trade hub faces shipping disruption from Hormuz crisis
alerts.details: Singapore, with a current account at 17.54% of GDP and extreme trade dependence, faces headwinds from global shipping disruptions and Hormuz crisis. Re-routing costs increase for Middle East-Asia trade flows. GDP trend decrease (2.2% to 1.8%). Trade openness trend decrease. Political stability at 1.42 (highest in dataset) provides institutional buffer.

alerts.trigger: Major protests: 20 killed in protests over Iran strikes
alerts.headline: Pakistan domestic protests compound war crisis: 20 killed over Iran strikes
alerts.details: Twenty people were killed in protests across Pakistan over the US-Israeli strikes on Iran, compounding the domestic instability from the declared war on Afghanistan. Political stability at -1.93 (strong_decrease) -- among the worst in the dataset. Multiple crises converging: active war, domestic unrest, and fiscal deterioration.
